mission: Ship a reliable, fast task graph that engineers trust for autonomous prioritization.

value_themes.name: Reliability
value_themes.description: Keep the scoring and ranking pipeline correct, deterministic, and crash-free under load.

value_themes.name: Growth
value_themes.description: Expand adoption: more projects onboarded and more teams ranking their backlogs.

value_themes.name: Polish
value_themes.description: Reduce paper-cuts in copy, config, and developer ergonomics.

time_context: Quarterly release cadence; the v2 launch window closes at the end of the quarter.
risk_posture: Conservative on data integrity and security; tolerant of cosmetic risk.
